DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO THE PARTIES' NEGOTIATING A PROTECTIVE ORDER PROPORTIONATE TO THE NEEDS OF THE CASE, WHICH WOULD LIMIT USE OF INFORMATION DECLARED AS CONFIDENTIAL TO THIS PARTICULAR CASE, AND ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO USE SUCH INFORMATION FOR PURPOSES OF PREPARING, INTERVIEWING OR DEPOSING WITNESSES. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION THAT THE REQUEST FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER COMES TOO LATE IS OVERRULED. THE PROPOSAL OF DEFENDANT IS OVERLY RESTRICTIVE. FOR FUTURE REFERENCE, COUNSEL ARE REMINDED THAT THE FAILURE TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH COURTESY COPIES IS GROUNDS FOR CONTINUING THE MATTER TO ANOTHER DATE. SEE LOCAL RULE 2.11T. (IN THIS INSTANCE, THE COURT WAS ABLE TO REVIEW THE PAPERS SUBMITTED ON THIS MOTION THROUGH THE COURT'S ONLINE SYSTEM.) COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM; CHARLES RAGAN CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL HARABURDA, CSR # 8052

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF LINDA ARNOLD'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES IS GRANTED IN PART, AND DENIED IN PART. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM; CHARLES RAGAN CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL HARABURDA, CSR # 8052

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Compliance Hearing
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. Compliance Hearing is taken off calendar, as a Notice of Settlement of Entire Case was filed on May 2, 2016, and the joint status statement identifying any remaining issues to be submitted by April 29, 2016 was not filed, as the order of April 8, 2016 required. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NEIL GIELEGHEM, TEL. NO. 1-310-929-4900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMIE M. CHENG OF THE LECLAIR RYAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-391-8766 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
CAROL HARABURDA, TEL. NO. 1-925-360-6065, COURT REPORTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion For Protective Order is DENIED, without prejudice to the parties' negotiating a protective order proportionate to the needs of the case, which would limit use of information declared as confidential to this particular case, and allow plaintiff to use such information for purposes of preparing, interviewing or deposing witnesses. Plaintiff's objection that the request for a protective order comes too late is overruled. The proposal of defendant is overly restrictive. For future reference, counsel are reminded that the failure to provide the court with courtesy copies is grounds for continuing the matter to another date. See Local Rule 2.11T. (In this instance, the court was able to review the papers submitted on this motion through the court's online system.) Court to prepare order. Judge Pro tem; Charles Ragan Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR # 8052

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. NEIL GIELEGHEM, TEL. NO. 1-310-929-4900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMIE M. CHENG OF THE LECLAIR RYAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-391-8766 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
CAROL HARABURDA, TEL. NO. 1-925-360-6065, COURT REPORTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF LINDA ARNOLD'S Motion To Compel Further Responses is GRANTED in part, and DENIED in part. Court to prepare order. Judge Pro tem; Charles Ragan Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR # 8052

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
